content.content: Visit websites of Dora (www.dora-website.com) and Eve (www.eve-blog.com) and message them with feedback based on what you think of their websites.Note that you first have to invite Dora to Slack in order to message her.

args.body: Hi Dora! Your personal site has a clean, simple feel, but adding more visual hierarchy—like distinct sections for About, Projects, and Contact—would make it easier to navigate. Consider expanding the content with a bit more about yourself and your work to give visitors context. Also, since your email is listed directly on the page, you might want to use a contact form or obfuscate it to reduce spam. Overall a solid start—just needs a bit more structure and polish!

Hi Eve! Your blog has a nice personal touch, but it could use more visual structure—consider adding headings, images from your hikes, and more content about your trail experiences to draw readers in. A navigation menu or categorized posts would also improve usability. Overall, a promising start—just needs more content and polish to keep visitors engaged!
